notes: An owner decision, made looking at the live TSLA panel: "Model of Models should blend the initiative book. It is a model." The Wave-1 spec had excluded add-on models from BOTH blended surfaces. That was half right. The equal-weight composite still excludes them — an additive average of an increment with whole-company values double-counts the operating core, structurally. But the model of models does not sum values: it selects FRAMES by walk-forward correlation with the name's own price. For a company priced on its programs, the initiative book is precisely the candidate frame the market may be
